durable_improvement: Added a fail-closed Cloudflare Pages control-plane metadata verifier that requires exactly one deployment matching the expected project, exact full source commit, exact Wrangler-returned deployment URL, and successful deploy stage.

verification.source_inspection: committed module, six adversarial tests, and path-scoped CI workflow inspected through GitHub contents API

remaining_blocker: Configure the cloudflare-research environment credentials and dispatch the production workflow. Then wire this verifier after Wrangler deployment and include its privacy-safe output in final evidence acceptance.
next_action: Update cloudflare-pages-research.yml so the credentialed run queries Cloudflare deployment metadata using DEPLOYMENT_URL and GITHUB_SHA, uploads cloudflare-deployment-metadata.json, and requires valid=true before accepting deployment evidence.
